svg.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Queen MQ: disk failover when PostgreSQL is unreachable
svg.desc: When PostgreSQL becomes unreachable, pushes do not fail. The broker writes them to a local file buffer and acknowledges to the client. When PostgreSQL recovers, a background scanner streams the buffered events back into the database in order. Zero message loss across the whole failover.

g.text: disk failover • zero message loss across PG outages
spilling pushes to local FILE_BUFFER • clients still get HTTP 201
draining file buffer back to db, in order
try PG → spill to disk on error
events on disk • preserve push order
